query: SELECT externalId, locationAddress, ipAddress, locId, connectionId, technology, planName, serviceActivationDate, customerExternalId, customerName, discoveryNotes FROM services WHERE externalId LIKE 'RVC-STUB-%' ORDER BY externalId;
